title: Beta Adventures
description: Make beta 1.7.3 a whole new adventure
body:
## Purpose of the modpack

This modpack focuses on making beta 1.7.3 more fun by containing content mods that add extra content and some QOL features

It's also a test to see if it's possible to create modpacks that work using [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)

Some examples of content mods on this modpacks are (but not just them)

- Aether
- Tropicraft
- Better Nether

## Mods included


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- [Accessory API](https://modrinth.com/mod/K9k9gNxR)
- [Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/9XSScuqN)
- [Apple Slices](https://modrinth.com/mod/MWFklCgr)
- [Better World Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/wnvWjnSe)
- [ClientsideEssentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/KR8mHwxW)
- [Elemental Creepers](https://modrinth.com/mod/pspD5n3C)
- [Entity Culling](https://github.com/viciscat/EntityCulling)
- [Glass Config API 3](https://modrinth.com/mod/rFeWTq4G)
- [Glass Networking](https://modrinth.com/mod/2r34vF2R)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/6v8kVRE3)
- [MojangFixStationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/cTg2WC1D)
- [Not Enough Food](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Pumpkin Moon](https://modrinth.com/mod/S0ZAZzzJ)
- [SameOldSpells](https://modrinth.com/mod/4FYIxEwj)
- [SmoothBeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/pocqBhPk)
- [Station API](https://modrinth.com/mod/472oW63Q)
- [Tropicraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/NyAJw76z)
- [ZastavkaAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/KOFg5p9n)

</details>

Enjoy :)
